---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for KIRITE
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A concise description of the feature you are proposing.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve? What use case does it enable?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working. Include:

- API surface changes (new instructions, SDK methods, CLI commands)
- Account structure changes
- Cryptographic considerations
- User-facing behavior

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative approaches you have considered and why they are less suitable.

## Technical Considerations

- Performance impact
- Security implications
- Backward compatibility
- Dependencies on other features or external systems

## Additional Context

Any mockups, references to other protocols, academic papers, or related issues.
